global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on promotional text and graphic elements.
global.main_message: Promoting special weekend fares at an attractive price.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A central graphic element featuring abstract shapes, possibly circles and squares, in a light color.

elements.label: Secondary graphic element
elements.description: A secondary graphic element that complements the central graphic, likely in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Main graphic element
elements.description: A prominent graphic element that is larger and more defined, possibly a square shape.

elements.label: Bottom graphic element
elements.description: A small graphic element located at the bottom, possibly a decorative shape.

elements.label: Small bottom graphic
elements.description: A small circular graphic element positioned at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Escape this weekend
elements.description: A bold, prominent headline text that communicates a special offer, set in a modern font.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Special fares today

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button with the text 'Get offer', designed to stand out.

elements.label: WayPoint logo
elements.description: A logo at the top of the ad, featuring the brand name 'WayPoint' in a stylized font.
